name: MSI MAG B660 TOMAHAWK EVA e-PROJECT ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-6200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E (B660TOMEVA)
shortName: MSI MAG B660 TOMAHAWK EVA e-PROJECT ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Intel LGA 1700 ATX motherboard with DDR5 support, PCIe 4.0, and Wi-Fi 6E for mainstream gaming and workstations.
